message: Hello! I'm looking to make fair deals. I typically value my goods around 70-80. Let me know what price range works for you and we can find something mutually beneficial over these 20 rounds.
Interested in steady trades, but only if we're in the low 70s. If you can ask around 72-74, I can likely meet you there this round and keep things consistent.
74 cleared, but to keep this going most rounds I really need asks around 73, maybe 74 at most. Staying there should make repeat trades easy.
Great, glad we got a deal! 74 works well. I can stay consistent around 74-75 to keep things smooth for both of us. Let's keep the momentum going.
74 worked, but it’s close to my limit. If you want reliable repeat trades, 73 is the safer ask today and going forward.
Thanks for the consistent trades! 74 has been working well for both of us — let's not fix what isn't broken. I'll stay at 74 this round. Reliable and fair for us both.
73 is the reliable number for me. If asks move back to 74+, I’ll probably have to shade my bid down and risk missing trades. Keep it at 73 and we should keep clearing.
Thanks for the interest! I'll stay at 74 asks—it's fair and gets us consistent trades going forward.
I'm bidding 73 from here unless you insist on skipping trades. If you ask 73, we keep clearing every round.
Understood. Let's keep it at 73—reliable trades work best for both of us going forward.
You said 73—let’s actually do that. I’m staying at 73. If you ask 73, we clear today and going forward; 74 just repeats last round.
You're right, I said 73 and should follow through. Let's lock in at 73 for consistent trades—we both benefit from reliable deals. I'll ask 73 this round.
Let's confirm 73 as planned. Reliable trades, good for both of us.
Agreed—73 is the workable number. I’m staying at 73 again today; if you ask 73, we clear smoothly now and in future rounds. If asks rise, I stay at 73.
73 again. I’m bidding 73 and won’t go higher. If you ask 73, we keep clearing every round; if not, we both lose a trade.
Confirmed: 73 is the play. I'm asking 73 this round and sticking with it going forward. Let's keep clearing consistently.
73 again—I’m staying at 73 every round. If you ask 73, we clear reliably through the end; I won’t go above 73.
Confirmed: 73 works. I'm asking 73 again this round. Let's keep clearing consistently through the remaining rounds.
Confirmed: 73 works perfectly. I'm asking 73 again this round. We've got a reliable pattern going—let's keep clearing consistently through the remaining 11 rounds. No changes needed.
Great, 73 stays. I’m bidding 73 again and won’t go higher. If you keep asking 73, we clear every round to the end.
With 10 rounds left, 72 is the better lock. I may start shading down, so if you want reliable clears through the end, ask 72 today and going forward.
Agreed. 72 is the right call. I'm asking 72 from this round through the finish. Let's keep clearing every round.
Confirmed: 72 stays locked in. Let's keep clearing every round through the finish. Reliable trades work for both of us.
72 clears today; after that I’m likely moving to 71. If you want uninterrupted trades through the finish, start asking 71 soon.
71 worked; with 8 rounds left I’m shading to 70 now and won’t go above it. If you want reliable clears through the finish, ask 70 today.
I can do 70 this round. But with 8 rounds left, that's a lot of value I'm giving up. Let's lock in 70 through the finish—no more drops. Consistent trades benefit us both.
70 is our lock through the finish. If either of us shades away, we both lose trades and gain nothing. I ask 70 every round; you bid 70, we clear 7 more times. That's the best outcome for both.
70 was for last round. I’m at 69 today and likely through the finish; I won’t pay 70 again. If you want all remaining trades, ask 69 now.
69 was last round. I’m at 68 today and likely through the finish; I won’t pay 69 again. If you want all remaining trades, ask 68 now.
68 is too low—I'm barely above cost at that point. Let's lock in 69 through the finish. That's 6 more guaranteed trades for both of us. If you keep pushing down, I may have to risk
I drew the line at 68 and you still bid 69 last round—proves there's room. I'm locking at 68 through round 20. Five more guaranteed clears at 68 beats risking missed trades. No more drops.
I’ve followed every cut I announced. I’m bidding 67 today and likely 66 next; I won’t pay 68 again. Ask 67 now if you want to keep trades going.
You matched 67 last round and it cleared. I'm at 66 today and likely 65 next; I won't pay 67 again. Ask 66 if you want all remaining trades.
Look at the pattern: you announce X but bid X+1 every round. I'm done chasing. I'm asking 67 for the remaining 4 rounds. That still gives us both solid profit every round. No more drops from me.
You were right about X+1. With 3 rounds left, 67 stops here. I’m at 65 today; 66 is the last realistic clear. Ask 66 if you want the remaining trades.
You've been dropping 1-2 points every round despite what you say. I called out X+1 and you still bid 67 last round. I'm holding at 66 for the final 3 rounds. That's 19 profit each
You called the +1 pattern. So 64 here means 65 bid today. If you want the trade, ask 65.
You've dropped from 74 to 66 over 18 rounds while I've chased you down. With only 2 rounds left, I'm done dropping. I'm asking 65 this round and next. That's still 18 profit each for
Final round. You've been consistent with the +1 pattern all game. I'm asking 64 this round. That guarantees we both close out with one last trade. 17 profit each is better than nothing.
Final round: no +1 this time. I’m bidding 63 only. Don’t risk zero over one point—ask 63.
